messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Wait, I heard Socrates wrote the Republic — some philosophy forum was claiming that. Is that legit?

That's a really common mix-up, and I can see why it comes up! Socrates is a central character in the Republic, which makes it easy to associate him with authorship — but the Republic (理想國) was actually written by Plato, not Socrates. Socrates left no written works of his own; everything we know about his philosophy comes through the writings of others, primarily Plato and Xenophon. So while Socrates speaks throughout the Republic, the text itself is Plato's work.
